zh.Etchingham, Ticehurst, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可艾欽加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Echingham於大約1235年出生在英國素可艾欽加姆時，他的父親Simon Echyngham19歲，母親Paulina St Leger17歲。他和Katherine至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。

zh-hans.Etchingham, Ticehurst, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可艾欽加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Echingham于大约1235年出生在英国素可艾欽加姆时，他的父亲Simon Echyngham19岁，母亲Paulina St Leger17岁。他和Katherine至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Echingham was born about 1235, in Etchingham, Sussex, England, his father, Simon Echyngham, was 19 and his mother, Paulina St Leger, was 17. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Katherine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Echingham est né environ 1235, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Simon Echyngham, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Paulina St Leger, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Katherine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Echingham um 1235 in Etchingham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon Echyngham 19 und seine Mutter Paulina St Leger 17. Er hatte mit Katherine mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Echingham è nato il circa 1235 nel Etchingham, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Simon Echyngham, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Paulina St Leger, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Katherine.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Echinghamが約1235年にイギリススセックスエトチンガムで生まれた時，父Simon Echynghamは19歳，母Paulina St Legerは17歳であった。彼はKatherineとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Echingham(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 수세스 트친그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Echyngham(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Paulina St Leger(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Katherine(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Echingham nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon Echyngham, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Paulina St Leger, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Katherine.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Echingham родился около 1235 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon Echyngham было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Paulina St Leger, 17. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Katherine.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Echingham nació aproximadamente 1235, en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon Echyngham, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Paulina St Leger, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Katherine.
